fallback.title: Problem detected
fallback.message: Something went wrong. Try again or contact support if the problem continues.

access_denied.title: Access denied
access_denied.message: Your account cannot perform this action.

validation.title: Information to correct
validation.message: Check the fields and try again.

not_found.title: Item not found
not_found.message: The requested resource is no longer available.

conflict.title: Action unavailable
conflict.message: The current state does not allow this action.

rate_limited.title: Too many requests
rate_limited.message: Wait a moment before trying again.

network_unavailable.title: Connection unavailable
network_unavailable.message: Check the connection and try again.

service_unavailable.title: Service temporarily unavailable
service_unavailable.message: Part of the service is temporarily unavailable.

unexpected.title: Problem detected
unexpected.message: Something went wrong. Try again or contact support if the problem continues.

missing_parameter.title: Missing information
missing_parameter.message: Required information is missing. Check the form and try again.

not_readable.title: Invalid request
not_readable.message: Some submitted information cannot be read. Check the form and try again.

type_mismatch.title: Invalid format
type_mismatch.message: A value does not have the expected format. Check the highlighted field and try again.

constraint_violation.title: Information to correct
constraint_violation.message: Correct the highlighted fields and try again.

failed.title: Information to correct
failed.message: Correct the highlighted fields and try again.

error.title: Account activation incomplete
error.message: Your workspace is still accessible, but an account check could not finish.

preview_accepted.title: Check complete
preview_accepted.message: The ticket can be sold now. If another seller sells the same number before confirmation, the limit may change.

basket_requires_changes.title: Ticket to correct
basket_requires_changes.message: Correct the highlighted lines and confirm again.

rejected_final.title: Sale unavailable
rejected_final.message: This sale cannot continue in the current state. Return to the seller list or choose another context.

approval_required.title: Stake too high
approval_required.message: Reduce the stake or request admin approval before selling this ticket.

draw_required.title: Missing draw
draw_required.message: Select an open draw and try again.

currency_required.title: Missing currency
currency_required.message: Reload the page. If the problem continues, contact support.

lines_required.title: Empty ticket
lines_required.message: Add at least one number before confirming the sale.

duplicate_line_number.title: Duplicate line
duplicate_line_number.message: Group stakes on a single line for the same number and play type.

game_required.title: Missing game
game_required.message: Choose Borlette, Maryaj, Loto 3, Loto 4, or Loto 5 before adding the line.

bet_type_required.title: Missing play type
bet_type_required.message: Choose the play type for the line and try again.

unsupported_bet_type.title: Incompatible type
unsupported_bet_type.message: This play type is not available for the selected game. Choose another game or remove the line.

selection_required.title: Missing number
selection_required.message: Enter the number to play before adding the line.

invalid_selection_format.title: Number to correct
invalid_selection_format.message: Correct the number for the selected game: 2 digits for Boul, 3 for Loto 3, 4 for Loto 4, 5 for Loto 5.

invalid_stake_amount.title: Invalid stake
invalid_stake_amount.message: Enter a stake greater than zero.

bet_option_required.title: Missing option
bet_option_required.message: Choose the game option, such as Exact, Box, or Pair, and try again.

bet_option_out_of_range.title: Invalid option
bet_option_out_of_range.message: The selected option does not exist for this game. Choose an available option.

bet_option_not_allowed.title: Option not allowed
bet_option_not_allowed.message: This game does not accept an option for this line. Remove the option and try again.

selection_exposure_limit_exceeded.title: Number sold too much
selection_exposure_limit_exceeded.message: This number reached its limit for this draw. Reduce the stake, choose another number, or remove the line.

exposure_changed.title: Limit changed during sale
exposure_changed.message: Another ticket changed the available limit. Review the ticket and confirm again.

draw_closed.title: Draw closed
draw_closed.message: Sales are closed for this draw. Choose another open draw.

draw_cutoff_exceeded.title: Sales closed for this draw
draw_cutoff_exceeded.message: The sales cutoff time has passed. Choose another open draw.

session_closed.title: Cashier session closed
session_closed.message: Open a cashier session before selling.

terminal_blocked.title: Seller blocked
terminal_blocked.message: This seller cannot sell right now. Use another active seller or unblock this one.

outlet_suspended.title: Point of sale suspended
outlet_suspended.message: Sales are suspended for this point of sale. Contact an administrator.

tenant_disabled.title: Workspace disabled
tenant_disabled.message: Sales are disabled for this tenant. Contact the platform administrator.

untrusted_operational_context.title: Invalid sale context
untrusted_operational_context.message: The sale is not attached to a trusted seller. Return to the seller list and reopen the sale from an active seller.

stake_too_high.title: Stake too high
stake_too_high.message: Reduce the stake on this line and try again.

stake_too_low.title: Stake too low
stake_too_low.message: Increase the stake on this line and try again.

basket_line_count_exceeded.title: Too many lines
basket_line_count_exceeded.message: Remove a few lines from the ticket and try again.

basket_total_exceeded.title: Ticket total too high
basket_total_exceeded.message: Reduce the stakes or split the sale into multiple tickets.

seller_terminal_actor_required.title: Seller required
seller_terminal_actor_required.message: This sale is not attached to a seller. Return to the seller list and open the sale from an active seller.
